conclusions.title: Typography foundation is inherited
conclusions.rationale: Both projects use the same semantic font and scale tokens.

conclusions.title: Primary accent is adapted
conclusions.rationale: The target preserves the semantic role with a local brand value.

conclusions.title: Review dialog is wider
conclusions.rationale: The target review workflow needs additional content width without changing dialog semantics.

conclusions.title: Global breakpoint policy is unresolved
conclusions.rationale: One simulated page per project is insufficient for a global policy.

conclusions.title: Legacy inline form must not propagate
conclusions.rationale: The target source explicitly marks it as replaced.

implementation_recommendations: Retain shared semantics while documenting target brand and workflow adaptations.
